title: Immersive Interfaces - Just Enough Items (JEI)
description: This texture pack adds support for Just Enough Items (JEI), matching its design with the look and feel of Immersive Interfaces.
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/immersive-interfaces-mod-support-unofficial) ### Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial This texture pack dedicated compatibility with Just Enough Items (JEI), integrating its design elements into the visual style of Immersive Interfaces. ### Before: ![v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56eed0d9616022d8ba11280f24d796f94c7011ad.png) ### After: ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78b1337f9f1c379c8c5e95f8412badaf4e48eefa.png)
